Hibernate_III/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Ehcache dependency to version 3.10.9 and add the 'jakarta' classifier to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Hibernate_III/pom.xml.why_exists: Without the 'jakarta' classifier, the Ehcache library uses the javax namespace, causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime when the application expects Jakarta EE classes (e.g., javax.cache.Cache vs jakarta.cache.Cache).
